nasb.text: Daniel said, “Let the name of God be blessed forever and ever, For wisdom and power belong to Him.

esv.text: Daniel answered and said: “Blessed be the name of God forever and ever, to whom belong wisdom and might.

cnv.text: 但以理說： “願　神的名得稱頌，從永遠直到永遠， 因為智慧和能力都是屬他的。

ccb.text: 说： “上帝的名永永远远当受称颂， 因为智慧和能力都属于祂。
